title: Abschlussbericht der Historikerkommission zu den Luftangriffen auf Dresden zwischen dem 13. und 15. Februar 1945
pages_or_sections: pp. 15-16 and pp. 66-67 of the PDF as opened in review
strengths: Best currently available official synthesis on the number killed in Dresden and explicit rejection of inflated six-figure myths.
limitations: Does not provide a clean civilian/military split or a denominator-ready population present count for the raid window.
notes: The report says that up to 25,000 people were killed in the air raids on Dresden from 13 to 15 February 1945 and also notes a wartime recovered-body figure of 22,096 by 3 April 1945.

title: 1945 - Bombings of Dresden
author_or_org: Air Force Historical Support Division / U.S. Air Force
strengths: Clear official summary of the raid window and the forces involved (RAF and US 8th Air Force).
notes: The fact sheet says that between 13 and 15 February 1945 more than a thousand heavy bombers of the RAF and the U.S. 8th Air Force struck Dresden.
